pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.7.6 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag for modern Java compilation.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation required for serial version UID in Java 17+.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: The class uses the @Serial annotation which was introduced in Java 14; without the import, the code fails to compile.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error in all configurations, using @Serial is the standard migration pattern for Java 17+ to explicitly mark serialization fields, replacing the implicit convention.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation to support Java 21 serialization best practices.
Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to explicitly mark it as a serialization field, satisfying Java 21 strictness.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime because Spring Boot 3 runs on Jakarta EE 9+ where javax.servlet packages no longer exist.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the Resource annotation from the javax.annotation package to the jakarta.annotation package to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Jakarta EE 9+ compliant servers and Spring Boot 3.x applications; using the old import results in a compile-time error 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Migrate WebSocket API imports from javax.websocket to jakarta.websocket to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.why_exists: javax.websocket package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.websocket does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
Replace List.remove(int index) with List.removeFirst() to explicitly remove the head element, leveraging Java 6+ Deque/List interface enhancements for clarity.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/contr.general_idea: Migrate the javax.annotation.Resource import to jakarta.annotation.Resource to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/contr.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3, causing a compilation error (package javax.annotation does not exist).

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/contr.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation.Resource import to jakarta.annotation.Resource for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/contr.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x; code fails to compile without the jakarta replacement.
